changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uk_exercise_catalog_body_name ON exercise (body_part, name) WHERE user_id IS NULL; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uk_exercise_user_body_name ON exercise (user_id, body_part, name) WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO exercise (user_id, body_part, name, sort_order) VALUES (NULL, 'chest', 'Butterfly', 0), (NULL, 'chest', 'Incline Bench Press', 1), (NULL, 'chest', 'Bench Press', 2), (NULL, 'chest', 'Dip', 3), (NULL, 'back', 'Pull Up', 0), (NULL, 'back', 'Barbell Row', 1), (NULL, 'back', 'Machine Row', 2), (NULL, 'legs', 'Squat', 0), (NULL, 'legs', 'Machine Squat', 1), (NULL, 'arms', 'Chin Up', 0), (NULL, 'arms', 'Dumbbell Curl', 1), (NULL, 'arms', 'Triceps Pushdown', 2), (NULL, 'shoulders', 'Barbell Overhead Press', 0), (NULL, 'shoulders', 'Machine Overhead Press', 1), (NULL, 'shoulders', 'Dumbbell Overhead Press', 2), (NULL, 'shoulders', 'Lateral Raise', 3);

changeSet.author: brogres

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE LOWER(nick) = 'kapiet'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO exercise (user_id, body_part, name, sort_order) SELECT u.id, v.body_part, v.name, v.sort_order FROM app_user u CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('chest', 'Incline Maszyna', 0), ('chest', 'push-ups', 0) ) AS v(body_part, name, sort_order) WHERE LOWER(u.nick) = 'kapiet';

changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: UPDATE workout_set ws SET exercise_id = ( SELECT e.id FROM exercise e INNER JOIN workout w ON w.id = ws.workout_id WHERE e.user_id = w.user_id AND e.body_part = ws.body_part AND e.name = ws.exercise LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ws.exercise_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: UPDATE workout_set ws SET exercise_id = ( SELECT e.id FROM exercise e WHERE e.user_id IS NULL AND e.body_part = ws.body_part AND e.name = ws.exercise LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ws.exercise_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO exercise (user_id, body_part, name, sort_order) SELECT DISTINCT w.user_id, ws.body_part, ws.exercise, 0 FROM workout_set ws INNER JOIN workout w ON w.id = ws.workout_id WHERE ws.exercise_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM exercise e WHERE e.user_id = w.user_id AND e.body_part = ws.body_part AND e.name = ws.exercise );

changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql: UPDATE workout_set ws SET exercise_id = ( SELECT e.id FROM exercise e INNER JOIN workout w ON w.id = ws.workout_id WHERE e.user_id = w.user_id AND e.body_part = ws.body_part AND e.name = ws.exercise LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ws.exercise_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: brogres
